channel.title: Landbot.io / other chatbot
channel.description:
Hello guys!
I'm just testing Frontity from a non-programmer point of view. I really like what I'm seeing! I am testing it on my personal blog for when I get https://dev.landbot.io/ to work to put in a website with 500,000 monthly visits also to Frontity.
Do you think that the development to implement https://dev.landbot.io/ would be very dificult? Does anyone have experience implementing any other chatbot?
Thank you!

item.title: Landbot.io / other chatbot
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hello @javierlorente.es, nice to have you in the community

javierlorente.es:

Do you think that the development to implement https://dev.landbot.io/ would be very dificult?

I’m not an expert here but taking a quick look at their docs it doesn’t seem too difficult to implement it. I guess it would depend on the features you need or how do you want to show it in your theme, but I think following the docs and making some changes it should work.

Let us know if you finally give it a try

Read full topic

item.title: Landbot.io / other chatbot
item.dc:creator: javierlorente.es
item.description:
Hello guys!

I’m just testing Frontity from a non-programmer point of view. I really like what I’m seeing! I am testing it on my personal blog for when I get https://dev.landbot.io/ to work to put in a website with 500,000 monthly visits also to Frontity.

Do you think that the development to implement https://dev.landbot.io/ would be very dificult? Does anyone have experience implementing any other chatbot?

Thank you!

Read full topic
